image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Science has a clearer story about phytoplankton blooms than social media does.
Context visual: These tiny organisms are the backbone of marine ecosystems, producing half of the world's oxygen.
Escalation visual: But what happens when they bloom excessively? It's a double-edged sword.
Evidence visual: While blooms can boost fish populations, they can also deplete oxygen, leading to dead zones.
Payoff visual: Understanding these blooms helps us manage our oceans better and protect marine life.
Cta visual: Curious about more ocean mysteries? Hit that follow button!
